## Problem / Use Case

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives did you evaluate?

## Expected Impact

- Who benefits?
- What workflow is improved?

## Additional Notes

Add examples, links, or mockups if useful.
